Top Pick for Creators

OMTech Solis Duo 30W Fiber & 20W Diode Dual Laser Engraver with Autofocus

  • Get Two Free Virtual Technical Support Session (90 minutes) Services When You Buy This Machine.
  • Versatile Marking Capabilities: OMTech's dual-laser engraver, with 30W fiber and 20W diode lasers, marks both metal and non-metal surfaces. Engrave wood, gold, acrylic, leather, stainless steel, copper, glass, and more with ease.
  • Instant Focus: Our automatic focusing feature ensures your engravings are precise without the hassle. Simply press the button to calibrate and match the lens for accurate results.
  • Fast Batch Processing: Equipped with a 16 MP HD camera and 10" x 10" & 5.9" x 5.9" processing areas, our laser engraver captures multiple targets at once. Finish larger projects faster and deliver exceptional results every time.
  • Multiple Control Methods: Control our fiber laser engraver via touchscreen, remote control, or software. Plus, you can design and send your projects straight from your phone with our intuitive software.
  • Safe & Clean Operation: With its fully-enclosed design and tinted window, our laser engraving machine blocks out laser leakage and traps harmful fumes, giving you a safe and clean work space while you focus on your engraving.
  • Download the User Manual Here.

OMTech Solis Duo

One Machine. Two Beam. Infinite Potential.

Watch Video

One Machine. Two Beams. Infinite Potential.

Custom Jewelry
Personalized Gifts
Shop Branding
Craft Production
Custom Jewelry
Easily engrave intricate designs on gold, silver, copper, and other precious metals for rings, pendants, and more!
Personalized Gifts
Create unique keychains, wallets, and decor from wood, leather, and acrylic to make every gift special.
Shop Branding
Quickly add logos and custom content to meet the specific needs of any offline store.
Craft Production
Handle both metal and non-metal materials effortlessly with our dual-laser engraver. Ideal for custom small-batch production.

Dual Laser Sources

Seamlessly toggle between the 1064 nm infrared laser and 455 nm diode laser for metal engraving, plastic marking, and wood etching, all without needing to change your equipment.

Dependable Safety

Blazing Marking Speed

Get more done in less time with 10,000 mm/s marking speed & 0.002 mm accuracy, perfect for high-demand tasks & quick turnarounds.

Rotary Axis Compatible

Rotary axis compatibility allows you to expand your engraving possibilities to easily engrave on cylindrical items and curved surfaces.

16 MP HD Camera

With its built-in camera, the OMTech Solis Duo quickly detects and aligns your designs for the ultimate convenience.

Effortless Engraving on Extended Materials

With the optional conveyor system, extend your working area up to 250 × 900 mm (9.8" × 35.4") — the longest in its class. Perfect for batch jobs and extra-long designs.

Rotary Axis Compatible

Rotary axis compatibility allows you to expand your engraving possibilities to easily engrave on cylindrical items and curved surfaces.

16 MP HD Camera

With its built-in camera, the OMTech Solis Duo quickly detects and aligns your designs for the ultimate convenience.

Effortless Engraving on Extended Materials

With the optional conveyor system, extend your working area up to 250 × 900 mm (9.8" × 35.4") — the longest in its class. Perfect for batch jobs and extra-long designs.

OMTech Solis Duo + Your Imagination = Infinite Potential

One-Touch Autofocus

Our autofocus system automatically detects and focuses the field lens when switching, with no manual adjustments needed.

7-Inch Touchscreen

The intuitive touchscreen makes operation straightforward and monitoring effortless.

Handy Remote Control

Manage your machine from a distance with pinpoint accuracy using the convenient remote.

Easy-to-Use Software

The built-in Sapphire software is fully compatible with LightBurn and other leading software.

7-Inch Touchscreen

The intuitive touchscreen makes operation straightforward and monitoring effortless.

Handy Remote Control

Manage your machine from a distance with pinpoint accuracy using the convenient remote.

Easy-to-Use Software

The built-in Sapphire software is fully compatible with LightBurn and other leading software.

Feature-Packed Software

With full support for LightBurn and other leading software, our marking machine ensures you have the flexibility to start your projects right away.

Specifications:

Processing Area: 9.8 x 9.8 in. & 5.9 x 5.9 in. (250 x 250 mm & 150 x 150 mm)

Rated Power: 360W

Fiber Laser Power: 30W

Fiber Laser Wavelength: 1064 nm

Fiber Laser Pulse Width: 80-120 ns

Diode Laser Power: 20W

Diode Laser Wavelength: 455 nm

Workbed Area: 12.5 x 12.5 in. (320 x 320 mm)

Max. Marking Speed: 393.7 ips (10,000 mm/s)

Marking Accuracy: 0.00008 in. (0.002 mm)

Operating Software: OMTech Lab

Compatible Software: LightBurn

Overall Dimensions (L*W*H): 12.6 x 19.7 x 18.7-35.2 in. (320 x 500 x 475-895 mm)

Net Weight: 55.1 lb. (25 kg)
